variants.text:
Hi [Name] 👋

Rental around this area is quite stable. Nearby completed condos can use as reference:

✅ Millerz Square: RM3,000+
✅ Vivo Residential Suites:  RM2,900–RM3,000+
✅ Avara Seputeh: RM3,000+

So from investment angle, there’s potential to generate passive income and let the tenant help cover part of the monthly installment.

Plus, this project comes with furnishing / fitting package, so it’s easier to rent out without spending too much extra on setup.

If you’re convenient, you can come and have a look at our showroom ah 😊
I can show you the layout, package and nearby rental reference together.

🅰️ Saturday, 12pm
🅱️ Sunday, 12pm

Which day is easier for you?

Hi [Name] 👋

这一带出租其实还蛮稳定的，可以参考附近 completed condo：

✅ Millerz Square：RM3,000+
✅ Vivo Residential Suites： RM2,900–RM3,000+
✅ Avara Seputeh：RM3,000+

所以如果是投资角度来看，未来是有机会做到 passive income，让租客帮你供一部分屋子的。

而且这个项目本身也有家私 / fitting package，出租会比较容易一点，不需要自己再花太多钱准备。

如果你方便的话，可以来看看我们的 showroom ah 😊
我可以直接给你看 layout、package，还有附近 rental reference，会比较清楚。

🅰️ Saturday, 12pm
🅱️ Sunday, 12pm

你比较方便哪一天？

Hi [Name] 👋

Are you still looking for a property around KL / Old Klang Road / Mid Valley area?
There’s a new launch at Old Klang Road:
Freehold, low density, doorstep MRT & fully furnished.
Estimated completion: 2026 Q4 🔑

I can send you the details if you’re interested.

Hi [名字] 👋

刚收到一个 Old Klang Road / Mid Valley 旁边新楼盘的消息，觉得还不错，顺便分享给你。
🎊 月供约 RM2,000+ 起
✅ Freehold 永久地契
🚆 Doorstep MRT 地铁旁
🏡 Full Furnished 全家私配套
🌳 Low Density 低密度
🔑 2026 Q4 完工
📝 2–3 房选择
💰 出租需求高

有兴趣的话，我发资料给你看看 😊

Hi [Name] 👋

Quick update — new launch at Old Klang Road / Mid Valley side just released.
From RM2,000+/month 🎊
2-3 rooms, fully furnished, freehold & doorstep MRT.
Suitable for own stay or rental investment.

Would you like me to share the e-brochure?

Hi [Name] 👋

I just received details of a newly launched project at Old Klang Road, very close to Mid Valley.
RM2,000+ monthly beside Mid Valley 🎊 Freehold 🎉 Low Density 🤩 Doorstep MRT 🔑 2026 Q4 Completion

✅ Freehold
❣️ Low Density
❤️ Doorstep MRT
🌈 Full Furnished
🌟 2026 Q4 Completion
📝 2-3 Rooms
💰 High Rental Demand
✅ Low Upfront Entry

Would you like me to send you the e-brochure and latest package?

Hi [Name] 👋

设施方面，这个项目是偏向舒服自住型的。

✅ 游泳池
✅ 健身房
✅ 多功能厅
✅ 儿童 / 家庭空间
✅ BBQ / 休闲区
✅ 24小时保安

所以它不只是地点和价格可以，整体居住环境也算完整，适合自住。

Hi [Name] 👋

Facilities wise, this project is designed for comfortable daily living.

✅ Swimming Pool
✅ Gym Room
✅ Multipurpose Hall
✅ Playground / Family Space
✅ BBQ / Leisure Area
✅ 24-hour Security

So it’s not only about price and location — the living environment is also quite complete for own stay.

Hi [Name] 👋

价格方面，在 Old Klang Road / Mid Valley 这一带来说，入场还算比较容易。

💰 Nett 价格大概 RM504k 起
📆 月供大概 RM2,100+ 起
🏡 有 2房到3房选择

目前价格参考：

🏠 Type A — 650sf
2房1厕 | 大概 RM504k nett 起

🏠 Type B — 756sf
2房2厕 | 大概 RM628k nett 起

🏠 Type C — 874sf
3房2厕 | 大概 RM708k nett 起

以这个地点来说，entry price 在附近新盘里面算比较好进场。

价格要根据最新单位和 package 确认。

Hi [Name] 👋

Price wise, the entry is still quite manageable for Old Klang Road / Mid Valley side.

💰 From around RM504k nett
📆 Monthly from around RM2,100+
🏡 2–3 rooms available

Current price reference:

🏠 Type A — 650sf
2R1B | From around RM504k nett

🏠 Type B — 756sf
2R2B | From around RM628k nett

🏠 Type C — 874sf
3R2B | From around RM708k nett

For this location, the entry is still quite reasonable compared to many new launches nearby.

Price subject to latest availability & package confirmation.

Hi [Name] 👋

For the package, this project is quite easy to enter.

🎁 Developer package available
💰 Low upfront entry
📄 Legal fee package included
🏡 Furnished / fitting package available
🔑 Suitable for own stay or rental investment

That’s why many buyers look at this one — because the location is central, but the entry is still quite manageable.

Would you like me to send you the latest package breakdown?

Hi [Name] 👋

这个项目的 package 算是比较容易进场。

🎁 有 Developer Package
💰 前期费用比较低
📄 Legal fee package 有包括
🏡 有家私 / 配套 package
🔑 自住或出租投资都可以考虑

所以很多人看这个盘，主要是因为地点在 KL 里面，但是进场门槛不会太高。

你要我发 latest package breakdown 给你看吗？

Hi [Name] 👋

地点方面，这个是在 Old Klang Road, KL，靠近 Mid Valley 那一带。

📍 去 Mid Valley / The Gardens 大概 5–8 分钟车程
🏥 去 Pantai Hospital KL 大概 8–10 分钟
🎓 去 University Malaya 大概 10–12 分钟
🛍 去 Pavilion Bukit Jalil 大概 12–15 分钟
🏙 去 KLCC / 市中心大概 15–20 分钟

而且也很容易接去 NPE & Federal Highway，所以自住或出租都算方便。

你要我发 exact location pin 给你看吗？

Hi [Name] 👋

Location wise, this one is at Old Klang Road, KL — very close to the Mid Valley side.

📍 Around 5–8 mins drive to Mid Valley / The Gardens
🏥 Around 8–10 mins to Pantai Hospital KL
🎓 Around 10–12 mins to University Malaya
🛍 Around 12–15 mins to Pavilion Bukit Jalil
🏙 Around 15–20 mins to KLCC / city centre

Also easy access to NPE & Federal Highway, so it’s quite convenient whether for own stay or rental investment.

Would you like me to send you the exact location pin?

🏠 Type A - 2R 1B (650sf)
🏠 Type B - 2R 2B (756sf)
🏠 Type C - 3R 2B (874sf)

2-3 rooms available, suitable for own stay or rental investment ☺️
Would you like me to send you the floor plans and latest price list?

🏠 A户型｜2房1卫（650平方尺）
🏠 B户型｜2房2卫（756平方尺）
🏠 C户型｜3房2卫（874平方尺）

有 2房到3房选择，自住或出租投资都可以考虑 ☺️
你想了解户型图和最新价格表吗？我可以发给你参考 😊

RM2,000+ 月供 | Mid Valley 旁 | Freehold | Low Density | Doorstep MRT | 2026 Q4 完工 👍

✅ Freehold 永久地契
❣️ Low Density 低密度
❤️ Doorstep MRT 地铁旁
🌈 Full Furnished 全家私配套
🌟 2026 Q4 Completion
📝 2–3 房选择
